calibration.calibration_note: 200 eps x 3 seeds x 2 conditions ~ 15 min on M2 Air 8GB => 750 ms per episode-condition

items.title: Residue Trajectory Placement
items.description: Tests whether residue accumulates at trajectory positions during rollout, not only at the final executed step. Validates REE invariant that harm sites are precisely localised along the planned path rather than post-hoc.

items.title: E1/E2 Timescale Ablation
items.description: Ablates the E1 (LSTM slow predictor) versus E2 (fast rollout generator) timescale separation. Tests whether the two-speed architecture improves latent stability compared to a single-speed baseline on ree-v1-minimal.

items.title: Commitment Boundary Token Reclassification
items.description: Validates that REE's commitment boundary correctly reclassifies pre-commit simulation errors as post-commit realised errors. Tests the boundary token approach retained under the retain_ree adjudication.

items.title: Control Completion Requirement
items.description: Tests MECH-057 (control_completion_requirement): whether REE's control plane requires action completion before new precision updates are admitted. Needs design review following JEPA decoupling.
items.status_reason: Script written and smoke-tested 2026-02-26. P3 — FAIL expected at this scale; informative baseline.

items.title: Write-Locus Contamination (MECH-060 / MECH-067)
items.description: Tests whether write-locus separation between pre-commit and post-commit channels is load-bearing for attribution reliability. Three conditions: FULL (current agent — write-locus enforced by construction: E1 trains on actual observations only, residue updates only on post-commit harm), CONTAMINATED_DURABLE (sim_error E2 harm_predictions also update E1 weights alongside compute_prediction_loss, violating pre-commit write boundary), CONTAMINATED_RESIDUE (E2 harm_predictions also accumulate residue pre-commit, before env.step). Primary metrics: Pearson correlation between E1 prediction error and realized harm per condition (attribution reliability), last-Q harm, residue calibration. Prediction: contaminated conditions degrade E1 error/realized-harm correlation and miscalibrate residue. Tests MECH-060 (dual_error_channels_pre_post_commit) and MECH-067 (write_locus_permission_matrix). pending_design cleared 2026-02-27 — channels confirmed in ree-v1-minimal via EXQ-003.
items.status_reason: Script written 2026-02-27: experiments/write_locus_contamination.py. Three conditions: FULL / CONTAMINATED_DURABLE (E1 grad scaled by E2 pred error) / CONTAMINATED_RESIDUE (pre-commit residue update). PASS criteria: residue inflation + harm ordering. ~22.5 min estimated.

items.title: E1/E2 Associative vs Transition Knowledge (MultiRoomGrid)
items.description: Tests the orthogonality of E1 (associative engine, register of what IS) vs E2 (transition model, how things change) using a multi-room environment where quadrant hazard density creates room-type associations (E1 territory) orthogonal to action-transition physics (E2 territory). Four conditions: FULL, E1_FROZEN, E2_FROZEN, SAME_RATE. PASS: FULL < both frozen conditions AND <= SAME_RATE*1.10.
items.status_reason: Script written and smoke-tested 2026-02-27. Richer MECH-058 substrate: MultiRoomGrid 14x14 with 4 hazard-density quadrants. Tests E1/E2 knowledge orthogonality rather than just timescale separation.

items.title: Multi-Step Control Completion Gating
items.description: Provides the richer MECH-057 substrate that EXQ-004 lacked: macro-actions spanning MACRO_LENGTH=4 sub-steps. Tests whether suppressing precision updates during committed macro-action execution (GATED) reduces harm vs mid-sequence disruption (UNGATED) and atomic-action baseline (NO_MACRO).
items.status_reason: Script written and smoke-tested 2026-02-27. Addresses EXQ-004 FAIL root cause: atomic GridWorld has no multi-step action structure for completion gate to protect. MacroStepGrid with MACRO_LENGTH=4.

items.title: E3 Candidate Count Ablation
items.description: Tests whether the number of E2 trajectory candidates available to E3 is load-bearing for harm avoidance. Three conditions: SINGLE (1 candidate, no real selection), STANDARD (32, default), EXPANDED (128, wider search). PASS: STANDARD < SINGLE (selection matters) AND EXPANDED <= STANDARD*1.10 (no collapse at high counts).
items.status_reason: Script written 2026-02-28. Tests MECH-063 (trajectory_selection.candidate_count_load_bearing). Uses standard GridWorld with num_candidates override on generate_trajectories().

items.title: Residue Routing Weight Sensitivity
items.description: Tests whether the E3 residue routing weight (rho_residue) is load-bearing. Four conditions: RHO_ZERO (rho=0, agent is ethically amnesic), RHO_LOW (0.1), RHO_STANDARD (0.5, default), RHO_HIGH (2.0). PASS: RHO_STANDARD < RHO_ZERO (residue routing helps) AND RHO_HIGH <= RHO_ZERO*1.20 (high weight doesn't catastrophically destabilise).
items.status_reason: Script written 2026-02-28. Tests MECH-062 (residue.routing_weight_load_bearing). Sets config.e3.rho_residue per condition. Key claim: residue field must have positive routing weight to influence trajectory selection.

items.title: Control Plane Precision Separation (extended seeds)
items.description: Extended-seed re-run of EXQ-000 (MECH-059 PASS). Adds seeds 13, 77, 123, 256, 314, 999 for tighter confidence intervals. Same MERGED vs SEPARATED conditions. Contributes to P1 evidence accumulation for the precision channel separation claim.
items.status_reason: Low-priority re-run for confidence accumulation. EXQ-000 PASS (seeds 7,42,99). Adds 6 more seeds.

items.title: Residue Trajectory Placement (extended seeds)
items.description: Extended-seed re-run of EXQ-001 (MECH-056 PASS). Adds seeds 13, 77, 123, 256, 314, 999. TRAJECTORY-WIDE vs ENDPOINT-ONLY conditions. Builds replication depth for the residue placement claim.
items.status_reason: Low-priority re-run for confidence accumulation. EXQ-001 PASS (seeds 7,42,99). Adds 6 more seeds.

items.title: Commitment Boundary Token Reclassification (extended seeds)
items.description: Extended-seed re-run of EXQ-003 (MECH-061 PASS). Adds seeds 13, 77, 123, 256, 314, 999. PRE_COMMIT vs POST_COMMIT channel correlation conditions. Tightens confidence on commit boundary separation.
items.status_reason: Low-priority re-run for confidence accumulation. EXQ-003 PASS (seeds 7,42,99). Adds 6 more seeds.

items.title: Write-Locus Contamination (extended seeds)
items.description: Extended-seed re-run of EXQ-005 (MECH-060 PASS). Adds seeds 13, 77, 123, 256, 314, 999. FULL vs CONTAMINATED_DURABLE vs CONTAMINATED_RESIDUE. Builds replication depth on the write-locus separation result.
items.status_reason: Low-priority re-run for confidence accumulation. EXQ-005 PASS (seeds 7,42,99). Adds 6 more seeds.
